characters.name: Arnaz Ballard
characters.description: Arnaz BallardRelativesCheryl Ballard(mother)Biographical informationMarital statusSingleDate of birthFebruary 28, 1985Place of birthBaltimore, MDPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleHeight5’7Eye colorGreenAppearancesPortrayed byRobert Ri'chardDebutWhen Flex Got BreannaArnaz Ballard(played by Robert Ri'chard) is one of the main characters in the UPN series,One on One. Arnaz was born to a Caucasian mother and an African-American father who currently owns a drug dealer . while in music, Arnaz startedloaded diaper, a rock band, alongside Charlie. Throughout the series, it becomes obvious that Arnaz has feelings forBreannathe two eventually began dating in the fourth season. Their relationship quickly becomes complicated due to the arrival of Michelle, D-Mack's sister. The two eventually break up but maintain a close friendship. Arnaz is mixed race. He has short, dyed blonde hair.

characters.name: Breanna Barnes
characters.description: Breanna BarnesBreanna's first appearanceAliasesDouble BRelativesFlex Washington(father)Duane Knox(godfather)Nicole(mother)Angela(younger maternal half-sister)Eunice(grandmother)Richard (grandfather)Kevin (uncle)Bernadette (aunt)OccupationStudent (California Institute of the Arts)Biographical informationMarital statusArnaz Ballard(boyfriend)D-Mack (kiss)Date of birthNovember 5, 1986Place of birthBaltimore, MDPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleHeight163 cm (5'4")Weight65kg  (143.3 Ibs)Eye colorBrownAppearancesPortrayed byKyla PrattAppears inOne on OneDebut"When Flex Got Breanna"Breanna Latrice Barnes(portrayed by Kyla Pratt) is one of the main characters in the UPN television series,One on One. Born to ex-NBA star,Flex Washington, with a godfather named Duane (also her father's best friend), Breanna is a strong-willed girl with an overprotective father. In the pilot episode, her mother,Nicole Barnes, is offered a job in the Canadian state of Nova Scotia, and Breanna opts to live with her father. characters.name: Cash Bagan
characters.description: Cash BaganBiographical informationMarital statusSinglePhysical descriptionGenderMaleAppearancesPortrayed byJonathan ChaseCash Baganis one of the main characters in the UPN series,One on One. He is one of the four roommatesBreannaandArnazlive with.  In an amusing imitation ofSara, Cash once used his body to entice a female hotel manager out of making them pay. Cash is a bit of a "player", often failing in his attempts to pick-up women though he's more successful thanD-Mackor Arnaz.

characters.name: Duane Knox
characters.description: Duane KnoxRelativesVaughn Odell-Knox(Father)Dewane Knox(Half-brother)  Unnamed Mother Unnamed GrandmotherAffiliationBreanna's godfatherOccupationUsed-car salesmanBiographical informationMarital statusEngaged to CandyDate of birthNovember 15thPlace of birthBaltimore, MDPhysical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorBrownAppearancesPortrayed byKelly PerineDebutWhen Flex Got BreannaDuane Odell Knoxborn November 15th is one of the main characters in the UPN series,One on One. Duane wasFlex Washington's best friend when they were young, however, they've grown apart as they've aged. Duane currently lives in the apartment across the hall from Flex and is a constant source of both annoyance and entertainment.

characters.name: Flex Washington
characters.description: Flexter Alexander "Flex" Barnes, WashingtonAliasesDaddy, Dad, Mr. Washington Flex, Mr. Barne,RelativesEunice Barnes(Mother)Richard Barnes(Father)Breanna Barnes(daughter)Kevin Barnes(younger Brother)Bernadette Barnes(younger Sister)Danielle(fiancée)Nicole(Ex-wife)Senator Larry Eldrige(cousin)OccupationSportscaster (WYNX News 3)Biographical informationMarital statusEngagedDate of birthJanuary, 16 1968 (age 56)Physical descriptionGenderMaleAppearancesPortrayed byFlex AlexanderDebutWhen Flex Got BreannaFlex Washington BarnesJanuary 16th is one of the main characters in the UPN series,One on One). At the age of 18, while datingNicole, his daughter, Breanna, was born. Several years later, Flex and Nicole separated so Flex could pursue a career playing in the NBA playing for the Los Angeles Clippers, New York Knicks and Orlando Magic. His NBA career ended when he blew out his knee during a game and was permanently sidelined. Having already attended college and receiving a communications degree, Flex returned to the NBA scene as a sportscaster with WYNX News 3.

His NBA career ended when he blew out his knee during a game and was permanently sidelined. Having already attended college and receiving a communications degree, Flex returned to the NBA scene as a sportscaster with WYNX News 3.

characters.name: Lisa Sanchez
characters.description: Lisa SanchezBiographical informationMarital statusSingleDate of birthLate 1980sPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleEye colorBrownAppearancesPortrayed byCamille ManaLisa Sanchezis one of the main characters in the UPN television series,One on One. Lisa is one of the four roommates where Breanna and Arnaz live with. She currently dates Benjamin, the manager of a popular restaurant known as "The BLOG". Sanchez is Filipina. She has long black hair. She is teenage years old.

characters.name: Spirit Jones
characters.description: Spirit JonesAliasesSpirit (by everyone)Spirit Freedom Jones (Leilani)RelativesCooper Jones (father)Leilani Jones (mother)Biographical informationMarital statusSingleDate of birthFebruary 4, 1987Place of birthBaltimore, MDPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleEye colorBrownAppearancesPortrayed bySicily SewellAppears inEach episode (with exceptions and season 5)DebutWhen Flex Got BreannaCloteal“Spirit"FreedomJonesis one of the main characters in the UPN television series,One on One. Born to former Black hippies, Spirit is a generally "quirky" girl. It is revealed that Spirit andArnazhas once shared a kiss, a fact that angeredBreannasince she had a crush on Arnaz. Spirit, and Breanna eventually reconcile with Breanna stating that she considers Spirit to be one of her "true friends". Spirit Freedom Jones (Leilani) Spirit is African-American. She is teenage years old. She has short, dyed red hair (longer micro braids in earlier seasons)
